- Or maybe RIGHT means "move both squares to the right" but the right square hit a wall and bounced?

- Right blue: cols 49-53 → cols 44-48 (moved left, toward center)

- LEFT/RIGHT: move both blue squares left/right together

- Right blue at cols 44-48 (now in the black region!)
So the blue squares moved into the black regions. This suggests that the blue squares can move through black areas, or the black areas are not solid walls.
